word: G221 - Ἀλεξανδρεύς - Alexandreús - al-ex-and-reuce' - Of Alexandria

sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀλεξανδρεύς

- Transliteration: Alexandreus

- Phonetic: al-ex-and-reuce'

- Definition:

1. a native or resident of Alexandria in Egypt

- Origin: from (the city so called)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From Ἀλεξάνδρεια Alexandreia (the city so called); an Alexandreian or inhabitant of Alexandria: - of Alexandria Alexandrian.
